title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Hyundai India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Hyundai India
jsonLd.description:
Hyundai India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hyundai India:
Hyundai India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyundai India!
